Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia
(Redirected from List of video game remakes and remastered ports)

This is a list of video game remakes and remasters and includes remakes as well as remasters of video games. It does not include clones and enhanced ports.

List

[edit]
This is a dynamic list and may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness. You can help by editing the page to add missing items, with references to reliable sources.
This list is incomplete; you can help by adding missing items. (January 2025)
Platform legend
3DS Nintendo 3DS
C64 Commodore 64
C128 Commodore 128
CPC Amstrad CPC
DS Nintendo DS
GB Game Boy
GC GameCube
GBA Game Boy Advance
GBC Game Boy Color
Genesis Sega Genesis/Mega Drive
N64 Nintendo 64
NES Nintendo Entertainment System
PS1 PlayStation
PCW Amstrad PCW
PS2 PlayStation 2
PS3 PlayStation 3
PS4 PlayStation 4
PS5 PlayStation 5
PSP PlayStation Portable
PSV PlayStation Vita
PSVR PlayStation VR
Saturn Sega Saturn
SNES Super Nintendo Entertainment System
Stadia Google Stadia
Switch Nintendo Switch
Switch 2 Nintendo Switch 2
Windows Microsoft Windows
